productDisplayName: Carlton London Men Brown Formal Shoes
description: Style Notecarlton london gives derby shoes a season update. We simply love this simply designed pair. Style them with tonal chinos, a tee and a blazer for off-duty or on-duty occasions. A super-comfy shoe, it's just right for this summer (which will last upto the next summer!)Product Details Brown tapering toed shoe with central lace-upsUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with an upraised heel, has grooves all overOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel to act as a heel guardMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust, grime or dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
